pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which copies the ExampleProject to this exact path.
Verified from export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for task success.
Verified from the task description and verifier.py exact text matching logic.
Verified by parsing project.json and documents in ExampleProject; TESTS.json represents the linked testing document.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires finding the first requirement in the SRS document with a downstream link to the TESTS document. By parsing SRS.json and TESTS.json from the ReqView ExampleProject (a synthetic demo project), the ground truth first valid requirement is 'SRS-53', which is linked to test case 'TESTS-21'. The verification logic in verifier.py is actually broken (assumes JSON 'links' are lists instead of dicts, causing an AttributeError), but tracing the documents confirms 'SRS-53' correctly satisfies the prompt criteria.
